premises.title: Transported Stranger
introLines: You wake up on an island you have never seen before.
The locals say the waters are toxic and monsters roam once the sun drops.
Rumors point to a giant Ghoul haunting the castle where an unstable portal flickers.
If you want to escape, you must trade, recruit allies, and survive the road to the castle.

premises.title: Spoken Chosen One
introLines: People stare when they see you and whisper that the promised outsider has finally arrived.
This island used to be peaceful, but monsters and poisoned tides have pushed everyone into fear.
No one can reach the castle portal while the giant Ghoul still controls the grounds.
To prove who you are, gather practical supplies through trade, earn followers, and lead the final push.

premises.title: Shipwreck Survivor
introLines: You are the only survivor of a wreck and wash up near a strange settlement.
The islanders warn you to avoid deep water and never travel alone near monster territory.
They say a giant Ghoul blocks the castle and the portal beyond it.
Your only chance is to bargain for supplies, gather companions, and break through to the castle.

premises.title: Banished Heir
introLines: You return to the island in secret after years of exile, unsure who still remembers your name.
The villages are divided, supplies are short, and the poisoned coastline has made travel dangerous.
Whispers claim a giant Ghoul now rules the castle approaches and guards the portal inside.
To reclaim your place and escape alive, you must trade carefully, win support, and survive the march to the castle.

premises.title: Monster Hunter For Hire
introLines: You came to the island for coin, expecting a difficult hunt and little else.
Instead you find frightened settlements, toxic waters, and monsters pushing closer to the homes each night.
Every contract leads back to the same truth: a giant Ghoul holds the castle and the unstable portal within.
If you want your reward and a way off the island, you must bargain for gear, gather allies, and finish the hunt.

premises.title: Forgotten Prisoner
introLines: You wake in a ruined cell with no memory of how long you have been trapped on the island.
Outside, wary locals tell you the sea is poisoned and the roads are watched by monsters after dark.
They speak of a giant Ghoul that keeps the castle sealed and the portal beyond reach.
To learn who you were and find a way out, you must trade for clues, earn trust, and fight your way to the castle.

premises.title: Scholar Of Ruins
introLines: You arrived to study the island's statues and castle, but your expedition scattered before you learned the truth.
Now the people hide behind locked doors, fearing toxic tides and monsters that roam the outer paths.
Ancient notes suggest the portal in the castle can be stabilised only after the giant Ghoul is defeated.
To complete your research and escape, you must barter for relics, recruit protectors, and piece together the safest route.

premises.title: Debtbound Messenger
introLines: You came carrying a sealed message, hoping to settle an old debt and leave quickly.
Instead you find an island trapped in panic, where poisoned waters cut off escape and monsters stalk the roads.
The message points toward the castle, where a giant Ghoul stands between the island and the portal inside.
To deliver what you carry and survive, you must trade for passage, choose allies wisely, and reach the castle alive.

premises.title: Statue-Marked Wanderer
introLines: When you wake beneath one of the giant statues, the villagers recoil at the strange mark on your skin.
They say the island has changed since the waters turned foul and monsters began answering an unseen call.
Many believe the giant Ghoul at the castle is tied to the same force that stirs the portal there.
If you want answers and a chance to escape, you must trade for knowledge, gather companions, and confront what waits at the castle.

premises.title: Last Of The Patrol
introLines: You are the last survivor of a failed patrol sent to map a safe path across the island.
Your reports are useless now: homes are abandoned, the shoreline is toxic, and monsters control key routes.
Survivors insist a giant Ghoul has made the castle its lair and cut off the portal within.
To finish the mission and get out, you must trade for provisions, rally help from the settlements, and force a path to the castle.

premises.title: False Prophet Escapee
introLines: You fled a cult that claimed the island had chosen you for a sacred fate.
Beyond their camp, you discover frightened villages, poisoned waters, and monsters spreading farther each night.
Even your former captors fear the giant Ghoul that holds the castle and the unstable portal beyond it.
If you want freedom instead of destiny, you must trade for supplies, build a loyal group, and carve your own road to the castle.
